title: Peerless Martial Spirit Episode 151 Subtitle
description: Little Chen Feng, his Dantian is like an iron, can't practice. Only his master did not leave him and did not want his Master killed by the powerful. Since then, no one has protected her and been intimidated by others. Chen Feng devoted himself to guarding the tomb for five years, only to discover that his Master was pretending to be dead, and found the blood of the highest dragon left by his Master, a mysterious ancient tripod. Since then, Chen Feng has risen up against the sky and embarked on a path to find a teacher and become a strong man
